title: GreenPan Valencia Pro Hard Anodised Healthy Ceramic Non-Stick 24 cm / 7.6 Litre Stock Pot with Lid, PFAS-Free, Induction, Oven Safe, Grey
features: CUTTING-EDGE CERAMIC NONSTICK: Infused with diamonds, GreenPan's metal utensil safe ceramic nonstick offers remarkable durability, balanced heating, and effortless cleanup
TOXIN-FREE: Our signature ceramic nonstick coating is free of PFAS, PFOA, lead or cadmium

AWARD-WINNING PERFORMANCE: Our Valencia Pro has set the standard for ceramic nonstick—winner of the best ceramic nonstick 20 cm and 28 cm frypans from America’s Test Kitchen and 2023 Good Housekeeping Sustainable Innovation Award
DUOFORGED HARD ANODIZED BODIES: Unbelievably tough and scratch-resistant, these pans are pre-treated before they’re hard anodized for extraordinary durability
MAGNETO INDUCTION BASES: Optimized for performance on all hobs, including induction
DURABLE GLASS LIDS: Offer an easy way to check on your meal in progress, oven safe up to 220˚C
EASY TO CLEAN: Most messes wipe clean, plus these pans are dishwasher safe for effortless cleanup
COMFORTABLE STAINLESS STEEL HANDLES: Mirror-polished stainless steel handle stays cool thanks to a V-shaped cutout
PERFORMS WHERE YOU NEED IT: Oven and broiler safe up to 315°C (lids up to 220˚C) and suitable for all hobs, including induction
description: From the manufacturer GREENPAN VALENCIA PRO HARD ANODIZED CERAMIC NONSTICK COOKWARE EXTRA DURABLE KITCHEN STANDBY VALENCIA PRO With GreenPan Valencia Pro Collection, hard anodized durability is available for all stovetops, including induction. Crafted from hard anodized aluminum for maximum strength and scratch resistance, this collection is finished with a Magneto base for superior induction efficiency and fantastic performance on any stovetop. Each of this collection’s pots and pans are finished with our signature healthy ceramic nonstick coating, which is metal utensil safe and free of PFAS. METAL UTENSIL SAFE HEALTHY CERAMIC NONSTICK Our Thermolon Minerals Pro ceramic nonstick coating is free of PFAS, PFOA, lead and cadmium and won't release toxic fumes at any temperature, so you can make any meal healthier. Versatile and durable, this coating can do what other nonstick coatings can't—sear, braise or deglaze, these pans make cooking effortless. HIGH PERFORMANCE ON ALL STOVETOPS MAGNETO INDUCTION TECHNOLOGY Our unique Magneto induction base offers maximum efficiency on induction stovetops and high performance on all stovetops for superb frying and no loss of energy or heat. OVEN SAFE & ERGONOMIC POLISHED STAINLESS STEEL HANDLE The riveted, ergonomic design of this stay-cool handle gives you a secure and comfortable grip. It's also oven safe up to 200°C. DISHWASHER SAFE EASY CLEANUP Our wipe clean pots and pans make cleanup a breeze, but for tough messes, our Valencia Pro collection is dishwasher safe. FOR MAXIMUM STRENGTH AND SCRATCH RESISTANCE HARD ANODIZED Extra durable to stand up to years of daily use. Previous page HARD ANODIZED BODIES Scratch-resistant and dishwasher safe. CERAMIC NONSTICK Diamond-reinforced ceramic nonstick is metal utensil safe and free of PFAS. POLISHED HANDLES Mirror-finished stainless steel handles that are ergonomic and oven safe. INDUCTION SAFE Our Magneto technology makes these pans safe on all stovetops, including induction. TEMPERED GLASS LID Keep an eye on your food without sacrificing heat. Oven safe up to 200°c. Next page HARD ANODIZED DURABILITY WITH INDUCTION STOVETOP PERFORMANCE 1 Body 2 Coating 3 Handle 4 Base 5 Lid COOKWARE MADE TO MAKE IT HEALTHY The video showcases the product in use. Using Ceramic Non-Stick Is oil needed with non-stick coatings? It’s always recommended to use a little oil or butter with any non-stick cookware. It creates a protective barrier between the non-stick coating and the food, improves heat distribution and makes your food taste better. Important – every type of cooking oil has a different smoke point. Never let your oil burn, as it can damage the non-stick. Turn down and save energy with ceramic non-stick coatings Our patented ceramic non-stick coating delivers excellent conductivity and, as a result distributes heat more effectively compared to conventional non-stick coatings. We recommend cooking on a lower heat setting than you would do with a conventional non-stick pan. E.g. cooking an egg: using a traditional 20cm frying pan on a gas hob the dial is set at number 5, with ceramic non-stick drop it back to number 2/3 for the same results. What oils should be used with a ceramic coating? Our ceramic non-stick coating heats up faster than conventional non-stick coatings, so oil will reach its smoking point quicker. Low/medium heat (No. 2/3 on a gas hob) will suffice to achieve perfect results, while avoiding carbonisation. For high-heat frying, we recommend oils with a high smoke point (e.g. peanut oil, grapeseed oil, etc.). Never use spray oils or extra virgin olive oil as they easily cause a build-up of residue on the cooking surface, creating a sticky layer. Super easy to clean Our Thermolon ceramic non-stick coating is super easy to clean. Allow it to naturally cool down before washing to avoid thermal shock and then use a soft sponge with warm soapy water. In case of burnt oil stains, soak your pan first. Avoid abrasive detergents, brushes, steel wool or iron sponges as they will damage the non-stick coating. Hand wash is always recommended to prolong the life of your product, however if required, most* of our ranges are dishwasher safe! *check product details Use silicone or wood utensils Softer tools (like silicone and wood) are gentler on your pan and will help your coating last longer. HEALTHY COOKING STARTS WITH GREENPAN
